original_image_tags: Stamped "RECEIVED / AUG 20 / 7 OU 5572 / U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE / F.B.I.".
Stamped upside down "U.S. DEPT. OF JUSTICE / FBI / EX-18 / DIRECTOR".

elements.description: A typed memorandum on yellowed paper with various stamps and handwritten annotations. The typed text includes 'Date: August 20, 1952', 'To: Director of Special Investigations', 'From: John Edgar Hoover', 'Subject: FLYING SAUCERS', and body text referencing a communication from Mr. John Calloway.

Multiple stamps and labels are present: a red stamp reading 'MAILED 4 AUG 2 1 1952 COMM - FBI', a stamped date 'AUG 21 1952', a red stamped date '66 SEP 3 1952', and various other administrative stamps and handwritten notations.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the same set of stamps and their content, with B adding detail about a typed memorandum background that A omits, but no direct contradictions on quoted text.
